2322700.name: Predatory Islands
2322700.description:
4X real-time strategy. The game takes place on a planet that turned out to be a forced landing site for space settlers. The spaceship crush prevented them from reaching their designated star system. Their home-to-be was almost completely covered with an ocean, so the colonists had no other choice but to settle down on the small islands. The catastrophe destroyed practically everything that the colonists were carrying with them. They found and divided the warp-engine that crashed onto the planet among groups of colonists. They used the parts of the space engine to assemble devices that allow the island to go into hyperspace. Since then each group of colonists owned their own island and the ability to instantly travel. You have to become the leader of such group and guide them to prosperity and victory.

Key Features:

Tournament sessions
Support for gaming sessions on a dedicated server which allows you to participate in various gaming tournaments, with a duration of several hours to several months and a total number of participants from 2 to hundreds or even thousands.

Social sphere and characters skills
Define a profession for the character. It can be a worker or a soldier. Gradually they will gain experience and raise their level. Organize the troops training according to your combat tactics. Build houses for the characters and plan their life. Determine how long they have to work and rest.

Changeable landscape
Fully terraformable landscape. Use terrain modification to defend the island. Apply landscape destruction from explosions when attacking the enemy.

Change of day and night
The game world exists in the same time zone. Day will change into night, and night into day. Determine which of your characters will stay awake during the day and which at night. Plan your attacks during daylight or darkness.

Manage the diet
Develop agriculture, cattle raising or fishing. Determine dietary diversity of the characters so that they are happy with your leadership. Surplus can be sold in some game scenarios.

Industry development
Create production plants and produce what is necessary to survive. Start with a workshop. The study of the lost knowledge will allow you to create more modern productions.
2322700.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
